summary:
Third-trimester ultrasound can visually determine fetal presentation—such as vertex versus breech—at the time of scan; however, it cannot reliably predict how twins will present at birth because fetal positioning changes significantly during labor. The lack of consistency between prenatal findings and actual delivery presentations limits its usefulness as a predictor. 

Final answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$

We have reached our conclusion based upon comprehensive review of available medical information related to fetal presentation dynamics across gestational periods.
